data.title: feat: add `AGENTS.md` routing file to skogai-caveman
data.description:
Repo: `/home/skogix/.local/src/marketplace/plugins/skogai-caveman`

This repo currently has `CLAUDE.md` but no `AGENTS.md`.

Scope:

* add repo-root `AGENTS.md`
* make it a concise routing/orientation file for the repo's skill workflow
* align it with repo-local skill ownership and current routing conventions
* avoid duplicating long-form content that should stay in skill docs or other source files

Done when the repo has an `AGENTS.md` that helps agent entry without becoming a second source of truth.
